input_text: In production, the checkout submit button fails in Chrome after valid card details are entered. Severity high. Expected payment submission, actual error banner. Status triaged.

expected_output.title: Checkout submit button fails
expected_output.expected_behavior: The payment should submit successfully and create an order.
expected_output.actual_behavior: The submit button fails and displays an error banner.

input_text: The search results page in staging shows a blank state after applying filters. Medium severity. Expected filtered results, actual empty panel. Status new.

expected_output.title: Search filters show blank results
expected_output.expected_behavior: Filtered search results should be displayed.
expected_output.actual_behavior: The page shows a blank results panel.

input_text: On the development environment, profile image upload returns a 400 error. Low severity. Expected upload success, actual validation error. Status new.

expected_output.title: Profile image upload returns 400
expected_output.actual_behavior: The upload returns a 400 validation error.

input_text: Production authentication modal loops after MFA approval in Edge. Critical severity because users cannot sign in. Status triaged.

expected_output.title: Authentication modal loops after MFA
steps_to_reproduce: Open sign in flow in Edge
expected_output.expected_behavior: The user should complete sign in after MFA approval.
expected_output.actual_behavior: The authentication modal loops and the user cannot sign in.

input_text: In test, reports export downloads a zero byte CSV after selecting date range. Medium severity. Expected populated CSV, actual empty file. Status in progress.

expected_output.title: Reports export downloads zero byte CSV
expected_output.expected_behavior: The exported CSV should contain report data.
expected_output.actual_behavior: The downloaded CSV is a zero byte file.

input_text: Production inventory page shows negative stock values in Firefox on Windows. High severity. Expected non-negative inventory counts, actual negative counts. Status triaged.

expected_output.title: Inventory page shows negative stock
steps_to_reproduce: Open inventory page in Firefox on Windows
expected_output.expected_behavior: Inventory counts should never display negative values.
expected_output.actual_behavior: The page displays negative stock values.

input_text: Staging notifications settings page does not save email preference changes in Safari. Low severity. Expected preferences saved, actual settings revert. Status new.

expected_output.title: Notifications preferences do not save
expected_output.expected_behavior: Email preference changes should be saved.

input_text: Production admin billing page crashes on invoice search. Critical severity. Expected search results, actual page crash. Status in progress.

expected_output.title: Admin billing page crashes on invoice search
expected_output.expected_behavior: Invoice search results should be displayed.
expected_output.actual_behavior: The page crashes during invoice search.

input_text: Development audit log filter ignores the selected model field. Low severity. Expected filtered logs, actual unfiltered logs. Status fixed.

expected_output.title: Audit log model filter ignored
expected_output.expected_behavior: The audit log should show only matching model rows.
expected_output.actual_behavior: The audit log continues to show unfiltered rows.

input_text: Test environment schema editor accepts invalid enum syntax. Medium severity. Expected validation error, actual schema saved. Status triaged.

expected_output.title: Schema editor accepts invalid enum syntax
expected_output.expected_behavior: The editor should reject invalid enum syntax.
expected_output.actual_behavior: The editor saves the invalid schema.
